title: echinochloa crus-galli f. atra
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli f. atra, also known as black millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of black millet include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. Black millet can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often consumed as a supplement to promote overall well-being.
